SELF-QUALIFICATION

IS THIS FOR YOU?

THIS IS FOR YOU IF:

  • ✓ You're a B2B SaaS founder at $500K–$5M ARR doing outbound manually or not at all.
  • ✓ You're spending more than 5 hours a week on prospecting, follow-ups, or CRM management.
  • ✓ You've tried an agency and got lists, not meetings.
  • ✓ You're considering hiring an SDR and want to see if an AI employee can do it better first.
  • ✓ You run an agency and your clients are asking about AI — and you want to deliver it without building the infrastructure yourself.

THIS IS NOT FOR YOU IF:

  • ✗ You're pre-revenue with no defined ICP.
  • ✗ You're looking for a chatbot or FAQ bot.
  • ✗ You want someone to manage your tools — not build infrastructure you own.
  • ✗ You need results in 3 days. (We need 12. If that's too long, we're not the fit.)
